DECLARATION OF MARK A. ROMEO IN SUPPORT OF REPLY IN SUPORT MTN TO VACATE AND SET ASIDE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PHOTON CONSULTING, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PHOTON CONSULTING, LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. (CCP 473(B).) PHOTON CONSULTING, LLC HAS DEMONSTRATED THAT IT IS ENTITLED TO RELIEF FROM THE JUDGMENT ENTERED AUGUST 13, 2013. PHOTON CONSULTING, LLC WAS NOT AWARE OF THE DATE OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER HEARING. (LARA DECL., 11.) THE COURT DOES NOT CONSIDER THE UNPUBLISHED OPINION SILVA V. MAGNO (2011) 2011 WL 3036191 IN RULING ON THIS MOTION. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED AND PHOTON CONSULTING, LLC'S OBJECTION IS SUSTAINED. PHOTON CONSULTING, LLC'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT PHOTON CONSULTING, LLC's MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is Granted. (CCP 473(b).) Photon Consulting, LLC has demonstrated that it is entitled to relief from the judgment entered August 13, 2013. Photon Consulting, LLC was not aware of the date of the Labor Commissioner hearing. (Lara Decl., 11.) The Court does not consider the unpublished opinion Silva v. Magno (2011) 2011 WL 3036191 in ruling on this motion. Plaintiff's objections are overruled and Photon Consulting, LLC's objection is sustained. Photon Consulting, LLC's request for judicial notice is granted. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/EHG)
